meta.title: WordPress Native APIs Playground test
meta.author: WordPress
meta.description: Verifies that WordPress Playground loaded the wp_native_apis PHP.wasm extension and shows quick browser-side timing numbers.

WPINC . '/html-api/class-wp-html-attribute-token.php', ABSPATH . WPINC . '/html-api/class-wp-html-span.php', ABSPATH . WPINC . '/html-api/class-wp-html-text-replacement.php', ABSPATH . WPINC . '; } return $html; } function native_api_repeat_xml( $count ) { $xml = ''; for ( $i = 0; $i < $count; $i++ ) { $xml .= 'Item ' . $i . ''; } return $xml . ''; } function native_api_repeat_text( $count ) { $text = ''; for ( $i = 0; $i < $count; $i++ ) { $text .= 'Read example.com/post-' . $i . ' and https://wordpress.org/news/' . $i . ' today. '; } return $text; } function native_api_benchmark_html( $html, $rounds ) { $native = native_api_time_callable( function () use ( $html, $rounds ) { $total = 0; for ( $round = 0; $round < $rounds; $round++ ) { $processor = new WP_HTML_Native_Tag_Processor( $html ); while ( $processor->next_tag( array( 'tag_name' => 'a' ) ) ) { $total++; } } return $total; } ); $php = null; native_api_load_wordpress_html_api(); if ( class_exists( 'WP_HTML_Tag_Processor' ) ) { $php = native_api_time_callable( function () use ( $html, $rounds ) { $total = 0; for ( $round = 0; $round < $rounds; $round++ ) { $processor = new WP_HTML_Tag_Processor( $html ); while ( $processor->next_tag( array( 'tag_name' => 'a' ) ) ) { $total++; } } return $total; } ); } return array( 'label' => 'HTML link scan', 'work' => number_format( $native['result'] ) . ' links scanned', 'native' => $native['seconds'], 'php' => $php ? $php['seconds'] : null, 'speedup' => $php && $native['seconds'] > 0 ? $php['seconds'] / $native['seconds'] : null, ); } function native_api_benchmark_xml( $xml, $rounds ) { $native = native_api_time_callable( function () use ( $xml, $rounds ) { $total = 0; $xml_class = 'WordPress\\XML\\NativeXMLProcessor'; for ( $round = 0; $round < $rounds; $round++ ) { $processor = $xml_class::create_from_string( $xml ); while ( $processor->next_tag( 'item' ) ) { $total++; } } return $total; } ); return array( 'label' => 'XML item scan', 'work' => number_format( $native['result'] ) . ' items scanned', 'native' => $native['seconds'], 'php' => null, ); } function native_api_benchmark_url( $text, $rounds ) { $native = native_api_time_callable( function () use ( $text, $rounds ) { $total = 0; $url_class = 'WordPress\\DataLiberation\\URL\\NativeURLInTextProcessor'; for ( $round = 0; $round < $rounds; $round++ ) { $processor = new $url_class( $text, 'https://wordpress.org' ); while ( $processor->next_url() ) { $total++; } } return $total; } ); return array( 'label' => 'URL-in-text scan', 'work' => number_format( $native['result'] ) . ' URLs scanned', 'native' => $native['seconds'], 'php' => null, ); } $classes = array( 'WP_HTML_Native_Tag_Processor', 'WP_HTML_Native_Processor', 'WordPress\\XML\\NativeXMLProcessor', 'WordPress\\DataLiberation\\URL\\NativeURLInTextProcessor', ); $missing = array(); foreach ( $classes as $class_name ) { if ( ! class_exists( $class_name, false ) ) { $missing[] = $class_name; } } $version = function_exists( 'wp_native_apis_extension_version' ) ? wp_native_apis_extension_version() : 'loaded'; $benchmarks = array(); $error = ''; if ( empty( $missing ) ) { try { $tag_processor = new WP_HTML_Native_Tag_Processor( '

' ); if ( ! is_object( $html_processor ) || ! $html_processor->next_tag( array( 'tag_name' => 'a' ) ) || 'A' !== $html_processor->get_tag() ) { throw new Exception( 'WP_HTML_Native_Processor did not find the link in a fragment.' ); } $xml_class = 'WordPress\\XML\\NativeXMLProcessor'; $xml_processor = $xml_class::create_from_string( '' ); if ( ! is_object( $xml_processor ) || ! $xml_processor->next_tag( 'item' ) || 'item' !== $xml_processor->get_tag_local_name() ) { throw new Exception( 'NativeXMLProcessor did not find the item element.' ); } $url_class = 'WordPress\\DataLiberation\\URL\\NativeURLInTextProcessor'; $url_processor = new $url_class( 'Visit example.com/docs now.', 'https://wordpress.org' ); if ( ! $url_processor->next_url() || 'example.com/docs' !== $url_processor->get_raw_url() || $url_processor->had_protocol() ) { throw new Exception( 'NativeURLInTextProcessor did not find the bare-domain URL.' ); } $benchmarks[] = native_api_benchmark_html( native_api_repeat_html( 250 ), 8 ); $benchmarks[] = native_api_benchmark_xml( native_api_repeat_xml( 350 ), 8 ); $benchmarks[] = native_api_benchmark_url( native_api_repeat_text( 250 ), 8 ); } catch ( Exception $exception ) { $error = $exception->getMessage(); http_response_code( 500 ); } } else { http_response_code( 500 ); } ?> Native APIs Playground test

✓ wp_native_apis WASM extension loaded

Native APIs are running in Playground.

The php-extension manifest loaded before PHP started, WordPress can see the extension classes, and the smoke tests passed. These quick timings ran inside this browser’s PHP.wasm runtime.

with native APIs.

Pure PHP: · × faster here

Browser timings vary by device and tab load. For repeatable host-extension comparisons, see the CI benchmark snapshot on the release page.

Extension version:

✕ wp_native_apis WASM extension was not loaded

The Native APIs extension is missing.

Missing classes:

This page can only test an extension that was loaded with the Playground php-extension query parameter before PHP started.
